---
title: "From ask to full agentic systems"
description: "Consumers range from single-shot ask to multi-step plan/retrieve/act/update agents; the action primitive is what today's template is missing."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [research-agents]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** Consumers range from single-shot ask to multi-step plan/retrieve/act/update agents; the action primitive is what today's template is missing.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Agent-Systems. Provisional and forward-looking.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
